verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let, let go of the old, And lay, lay hold on the new, In laying it down a new life is found There a new life waits for you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cast your bread upon the waters After many days it shall return. If you pour out your soul Not a part, but the whole A new life is there for you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In saving your life, you will lose it, But by losing it, you will find it, Down in the ground That's where death is found, Death that brings life anew.
